---
title : "Pemodelan Mahasiswa ITERA"
subtitle : "Evaluasi Berbasis Data dengan Bootstrap, Cross Validation, dan Kriteria Informasi"
author : "Naufal Aziz Ferdian Tampan Membahana"
date : today
date-format: "D MMMM YYYY"
lang: id


format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: "Daftar Isi"
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
    highlight-style: github
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Tampilkan kode"
    code-tools: true
    fig-width: 8
    fig-height: 5
    fig-align: center
    df-print: paged

execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
  cache: false
---


```{r}

# ── Load paket ───────────────────────────────────────────────
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(boot)
library(caret)
library(cluster)
library(factoextra)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(GGally)
library(corrplot)
library(scales)
library(gridExtra)

# ── Tema ggplot2 global ──────────────────────────────────────
theme_set(
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "grey40"),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
)

set.seed(42)
```


```{r}

#| label-baca data

df_clean <- read_csv("dataset_profil_mahasiswa_ITERA_clean.csv")

str(df_clean)
```

# Analsis Eskplorasi Data(EDA)

## Ringakasan Statistik

```{r}

#| label : tabel-ringkasan 
#| tbl-cap: "Statistik deslriptif variabel numerik"


#df_clean <- df_clean > mutate(
#  bmi = round(berat_badan /(tinggi_badan / 100)^2, 2))
```


```{r}
# df_clean <- select(ipk, jam_belajar_perminggu, tinggi_badan, berat_badan, bmi, jumlah_anggota_keluarga)




```

```
